summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CultGig 3D landing page. Backend APIs working correctly with minor validation issue. Frontend fully functional with all components rendering and interactive features working.

validation_issues.issue: Backend accepts invalid email formats and empty names without validation
validation_issues.impact: Should return 422 validation error but returns 200 with invalid data

passed_tests: Navbar renders with logo, navigation links, and CTA button
3D Three.js canvas visible and functional in hero section
Hero section with all content elements (headline, CTAs, trust line, scroll arrow)
Features section with 6 feature cards (3 for Artists, 3 for Businesses)
How It Works section with working tab switching between Artists and Businesses
App Download section with App Store and Google Play buttons
Waitlist form accepts input and shows success state on submission
Footer with logo, quick links, and social icons
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes correctly
Responsive design works on mobile viewport
action_item_for_main_agent: Add proper input validation to the waitlist endpoint to reject invalid email formats and empty names with 422 status code
success_percentage: Backend: 85.7% (6/7 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all components and interactions working)
